# What to Makan SG

> A food recommendation quiz for Singapore. Users answer 6 quick questions about what
> they're in the mood for, and the app matches them against a database of ~70 local
> dishes, then shows perfect and close matches with a "find nearby" Google Maps link.

Hungry but brain cannot decide? Answer 6 questions, then can go makan already.

The app is a single-page experience: a landing screen, six preference questions
(moisture, protein, carb, fried, spiciness, appetite), and a results screen.

## Pages

- [Home / Quiz](https://makan.taza.me/): The full quiz and results flow.

## About

- Built by Taza (Taftazani Aulia), an Indonesian entrepreneur based in Singapore.
- Live site: https://makan.taza.me/
